title: Co-molded golf club head
abstract: A golf club head comprising a face plate, a body, bonding material, and at least one retainer, wherein the bonding material and at least one retainer are the sole medium coupling the face plate and body.
claims: 1. An iron-type golf club head, comprising; a face plate, a body, and a bonding material; wherein the body comprises a sole, and top rail; the bonding material is substantially disposed between the face plate and body; the bonding material crosslinks the face plate to the body; the face plate is not welded to the body; the face plate comprises at least one retainer disposed within a volume of the iron-type golf club head; the bonding material engages both the at least one body locking geometry and the at least one retainer; and the face plate further comprises a face plate density; the body further comprises a body density; the iron-type golf club head further comprises a density ratio; wherein the density ratio is a ratio of the body density to the face plate density; and the density ratio is greater than 3.
